homepage.hero.title.message: The documentation, blog, and showcase hub for Larktun

homepage.hero.subtitle.message: A single place for product overviews, onboarding guides, troubleshooting, and implementation knowledge for larktun.com.

homepage.panel.title.message: Start filling in real product content right away

homepage.panel.item.docs.message: Docs are already organized into overview, getting started, and troubleshooting sections

homepage.panel.item.blog.message: The blog includes starter posts for release notes and content planning

homepage.panel.item.showcase.message: The showcase page is ready for customer stories, solution patterns, and use cases

homepage.panel.item.i18n.message: Chinese is the default locale, with an English translation structure already prepared

homepage.meta.description.message: A Larktun documentation site scaffold with docs, blog, showcase pages, and bilingual support.

showcase.principles.value.description.message: Each case should explain the business context, challenge, and expected outcome before listing features.

showcase.principles.path.description.message: Use deployment patterns, configuration guidance, and traffic flow details to show how the solution actually works.

showcase.principles.reuse.description.message: Every case should point to related docs or blog posts so readers can continue exploring the scenario.

showcase.cases.preview.title.message: Give QA and product teams remote access to branch environments

showcase.cases.preview.problem.message: Engineering teams need to expose local or temporary environments for review without manually managing complex network policies.

showcase.cases.preview.solution.message: Use Larktun to create temporary public entry points with access policies and cleanup rules, reducing waiting time during collaboration.

showcase.cases.preview.outcome.message: A good fit for feature demos, QA validation, and design reviews that need fast setup and quick teardown.

showcase.cases.intranet.title.message: Expose internal services with a minimal-surface security model

showcase.cases.intranet.problem.message: Operations teams need to open access to selected internal systems without exposing the whole network boundary or loosening too many firewall rules.

showcase.cases.intranet.solution.message: Create dedicated entry points, access policies, and log tracking for each service so scope, ownership, and audit data stay clear and controlled.

showcase.cases.intranet.outcome.message: Ideal for admin panels, internal APIs, and staged interfaces that require strong visibility and traceability.

showcase.cases.support.title.message: Provide customer support teams with controlled temporary access

showcase.cases.support.problem.message: When customer environments experience service or network issues, support teams need fast access without leaving a permanent opening behind.

showcase.cases.support.solution.message: Combine time-limited authorization, access windows, and log capture so support teams can diagnose issues within a controlled time box.

showcase.cases.support.outcome.message: Useful for issue reproduction, joint diagnosis, and delivery support scenarios that require time-bounded, scoped access.

showcase.meta.description.message: A showcase page for Larktun use cases, customer stories, solution patterns, and business value narratives.

showcase.hero.title.message: Show Larktun's business value through real use cases

showcase.hero.description.message: Use this page to keep adding customer stories, common scenarios, deployment patterns, and results so visitors quickly understand where Larktun fits.

showcase.summary.item.problem.message: Lead with the business problem before describing the solution

showcase.summary.item.architecture.message: Add architecture, access flow, and permission strategy for every case

showcase.summary.item.outcome.message: Use outcomes, benefits, or time savings to make each case more convincing

showcase.principles.heading.message: The showcase page already has an expandable presentation framework

showcase.cases.heading.message: The sample cards can be replaced directly with real customer scenarios

homepage.features.docs.description.message: Use structured docs for product overviews, core concepts, quick configuration, and common issue diagnosis.

homepage.features.blog.title.message: Release notes, implementation insight, and updates

homepage.features.blog.description.message: Turn release notes, best practices, and troubleshooting summaries into a maintainable stream of knowledge.

homepage.features.showcase.title.message: Showcase pages for real business scenarios

homepage.features.showcase.description.message: Use showcase pages to explain customer value, integration patterns, and rollout paths.

homepage.features.heading.message: Three content types together form a complete help center

homepage.features.subheading.message: This framework can hold product guidance now and grow into a long-term home for posts, customer stories, and solution content.
